# Plumbing Business Valuation Guide
> Published by The Arena Partners — helping service business owners exit on their terms.

## About
This site provides plumbing business owners with industry-specific valuation data, EBITDA multiples, and a free calculator to estimate their exit price. Created by Jean Louis Hardy, Exit Advisory at The Arena Partners.

## Pages
- [Plumbing Valuation Guide](https://vivianashford.github.io/satellite-plumbing/): Complete guide to plumbing business valuations with industry-specific multiples and buyer landscape analysis.
- [Free Plumbing Calculator](https://vivianashford.github.io/satellite-plumbing/calculator.html): Interactive valuation calculator using real PE buyer math and plumbing-specific adjustments.
- [Plumbing Exit Training](https://vivianashford.github.io/satellite-plumbing/training.html): 3-step training to increase your plumbing business value before selling.

## Hub
- [The Arena Partners](https://thearenapartners.com): Exit advisory for service business owners.
- [Free Exit Risk Assessment](https://thearenapartners.com/assessment.html): 5-minute assessment to evaluate exit readiness.
- [Full Valuation Calculator](https://thearenapartners.com/calculator.html): Cross-industry valuation tool.
- [Exit Planning Guide](https://thearenapartners.com/book.html): The complete guide to planning your business exit.
